heading: Cadet applicants; preappointment travel to Academy
label: 1926 Cadet applicants; preappointment travel to Academy
text: The Secretary is authorized to expend appropriated funds for selective preappointment travel to the Academy for orientation visits of cadet applicants.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 181a of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 181a of this title
